modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help requesting an HTTPS certificate for my website.

full_description_text: I want to request a certificate for my website. I’m not sure how to do it. I filled out the form but need more info on the process. Please help me with this.
short_description: Need help requesting an HTTPS certificate for my website.
description: I want to request a certificate for my website. I’m not sure how to do it. I filled out the form but need more info on the process. Please help me with this.
